name: session-pins
description: Pin editable instructions and live files into every prompt of a Copilot CLI session. Adds a /pin command and agent-callable pin tools.
postInstallMessage:
session-pins: one-time activation needed. Copilot CLI does not yet auto-load plugin extensions, so run the bundled install script once, then relaunch with --experimental:
  Windows: `& "$HOME\.copilot\installed-plugins\agency-playground\session-pins\install.ps1"`
  macOS/Linux: `"$HOME/.copilot/installed-plugins/agency-playground/session-pins/install.sh"`
Then use /pin, or just ask Copilot to pin an instruction or file.
